zh.lifeSummary: 當Hywel ap Gruffudd於1230年出生在威爾士卡迪甘史爾吉爾寧時，他的父親Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan44歲，母親Gwenllian verch Hywel25歲。他於1255年與Tangwystl Verch Daffyd在威爾士卡馬特史爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1282年11月6日在威爾士安格萊蓋爾文享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hywel ap Gruffudd于1230年出生在威尔士卡迪甘史爾吉爾寧时，他的父亲Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan44岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Hywel25岁。他于1255年与Tangwystl Verch Daffyd在威尔士卡馬特史爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1282年11月6日在威尔士安格萊蓋爾文享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Hywel ap Gruffudd was born in 1230, in Cilcennin, Cardiganshire, Wales, his father, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, was 44 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Hywel, was 25. He married Tangwystl Verch Daffyd in 1255, in Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 6 November 1282, in Gaerwen, Anglesey, Wales, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hywel ap Gruffudd est né en 1230, à Cilcennin, Cardiganshire, Galles, son père, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Hywel, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Tangwystl Verch Daffyd en 1255, à Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 6 novembre 1282, à Gaerwen, Anglesey, Galles, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hywel ap Gruffudd 1230 in Cilcennin, Cardiganshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan 44 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Hywel 25. Er hat 1255 in Carmarthenshire, Wales Tangwystl Verch Daffyd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 6. November 1282 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Gaerwen, Anglesey, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Gruffudd è nato il nel 1230 nel Cilcennin, Cardiganshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Hywel, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Tangwystl Verch Daffyd nel 1255, nel Carmarthenshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 6 novembre 1282, nel Gaerwen, Anglesey, Galles, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Gruffuddが1230年にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアシルセニンで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychanは44歳，母Gwenllian verch Hywelは25歳であった。1255年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアでTangwystl Verch Daffydと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1282年11月6日にウェールズアングレセイガアーウンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Gruffudd(이)가 1230년 웨일스 카디건실르 시스닌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Hywel(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1255년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 Tangwystl Verch Daffyd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 11월 6일 웨일스 앤글레시 가이웬에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hywel ap Gruffudd nasceu em 1230, em Cilcennin, Cardiganshire, Gales, seu pai, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Hywel, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Tangwystl Verch Daffyd em 1255, em Carmarthenshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1282, em Gaerwen, Anglesey, Gales, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hywel ap Gruffudd родился в 1230 г. в местности силсеннин, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Hywel, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Tangwystl Verch Daffyd в 1255 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 6 ноября 1282 г. в местности гаирвен, англеси, Уэльс в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hywel ap Gruffudd nació en 1230, en Cilcennin, Cardiganshire, Gales, su papá, Gruffudd ab Ednyfed Fychan, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Hywel, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Tangwystl Verch Daffyd en 1255, en Carmarthenshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1282, en Gaerwen, Isla Oscura, Gales, a la edad de 52 años.
